conversations.content: Today we studied the Hengli Heavy Industry Major Safety Incident Emergency Response Plan. If a serious injury incident involving multiple people occurs in the stamping workshop...
Multiple serious injuries? That's already a major incident! Are there other trigger conditions?
Or if a toxic gas leak is detected in the hazardous chemical warehouse, or if a fire starts in the plant's electrical system and spreads to the finished goods warehouse.
Toxic gas leak and fire spreading to finished goods warehouse — both life-threatening! If any of these three occurs, what must the safety director do?

then the safety director must immediately activate the plant-wide audible and visual alarm and evacuate all non-rescue personnel, and immediately cut off the main power supply to the workshop and close all gas pipeline valves, and submit the initial accident report simultaneously to the Emergency Management Bureau and the Fire Department.

think: Hengli Heavy Industry major safety incident: trigger conditions (multiple serious injuries in stamping workshop OR toxic gas leak in hazmat warehouse OR electrical fire spreading to finished goods warehouse) → activate plant-wide alarm + evacuate non-rescue personnel + cut main power + close gas valves + submit initial report to Emergency Bureau and Fire Department.
memory: Hengli Heavy Industry Major Safety Incident Emergency Response Plan: If a serious injury incident involving multiple people occurs in the stamping workshop, or a toxic gas leak is detected in the hazardous chemical warehouse, or a fire starts in the plant's electrical system and spreads to the finished goods warehouse, then the safety director must immediately activate the plant-wide audible and visual alarm and evacuate all non-rescue personnel, and immediately cut off the main power supply to the workshop and close all gas pipeline valves, and submit the initial accident report simultaneously to the Emergency Management Bureau and the Fire Department.
